retry_reason: Failure may result from transient memory pressure (devres alloc) or EPROBE_DEFER from _regulator_get; retrying under the same conditions could succeed later.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is device resource management (devm pattern) rather than pure refcount operations; the actual refcount is handled inside _regulator_get, while the wrapper adds significant devres allocation/registration logic.
